name: deckofus
description: Real-time two-device couples card game — root dev orchestrator.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c magenta,cyan -k "npm --prefix apps/api run dev" "npm --prefix apps/web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/api run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix apps/api install && npm --prefix apps/web install
